name: Case 1 — Low Risk (consistent claim)
description: URI treated with a single medication and discharged same day. The bill matches the chart with a modest amount.
chart_text: Patient presented with cough, sore throat, and low-grade fever. Diagnosed with an upper respiratory infection (URI). Prescribed amoxicillin. Patient was discharged same day with home care instructions.
bill_text: Claim submitted for an upper respiratory infection (URI) office visit. Medication billed: amoxicillin. Same-day discharge, low complexity visit. Total claim amount: $500.
